Glaceon

#0470 Leafeon #0472 Gliscor
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Glaceon is an Ice type Pokémon introduced in Generation 4.

Glaceon

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0471
Type Ice
Species Fresh Snow Pokémon
Height 0.8 m (2′07″)
Weight 25.9 kg (57.1 lbs)
Abilities 1. Snow Cloak
Ice Body (hidden ability)
Local № 0170 (Platinum)
0098 (Black 2/White 2)
0084 (X/Y — Coastal Kalos)
0130 (Sun/Moon — Alola dex)
0160 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0203 (Sword/Shield)
0032 (Legends: Arceus)
0186 (Scarlet/Violet)
0107 (Legends: Z-A)
0080 (The Crown Tundra)

Training

EV yield 2 Sp. Atk
Catch rate 45 (5.9% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 35 (lower than normal)
Base Exp. 184
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 87.5% male, 12.5% female
Egg cycles 35 (8,739–8,995 steps)

Base stats

HP 65

Attack 60

Defense 110
202 350
Sp. Atk 130
238 394

Speed 65
121 251
Total 525 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

(use Ice Stone, or level up near an Ice-rock)

Ice
#0133
Eevee
Normal
(after Fairy-type move learned, and either ♥♥ Affection in Gen 6-7 or high friendship in Gen 8+)
#0700
Sylveon
Fairy

Glaceon changes

  • In Generation 4, Glaceon has a base experience yield of 196.

Pokédex entries

Diamond
Pearl		 As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.
Platinum By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry.
HeartGold
SoulSilver		 It causes small ice crystals to form by lowering the temperature of the surrounding atmosphere.
Black
White		 By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry.
Black 2
White 2		 It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire.
X
Omega Ruby		 By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire.
Sun It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust.
Moon It freezes its fur into icicles, spiky and sharp, and tackles its prey.
Ultra Sun It protects itself by freezing its fur into sharp needles. It can drop its body temperature below –75 degrees Fahrenheit.
Ultra Moon It can instantaneously freeze any moisture that’s around it, creating ice pellets to shoot at its prey.
Sword Any who become captivated by the beauty of the snowfall that Glaceon creates will be frozen before they know it.
Shield The coldness emanating from Glaceon causes powdery snow to form, making it quite a popular Pokémon at ski resorts.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 As a defense mechanism, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand out like needles.
Legends: Arceus Glaceon is able to lower its body temperature very quickly. It freezes the atmosphere, creating diamond dust that glitters like gems while it flutters and dances around.
Scarlet It can control its body temperature at will. This enables it to freeze the moisture in the atmosphere, creating flurries of diamond dust.
Violet It lowers its body heat to freeze its fur. The hairs then become like needles it can fire.

Other languages

English Glaceon
Japanese グレイシア (Glacia)
German Glaziola
French Givrali
Italian Glaceon
Spanish Glaceon
Korean 글레이시아 (geulleisia)
Chinese (Simplified) 冰伊布
Chinese (Traditional) 冰伊布

 

English Fresh Snow Pokémon
Japanese しんせつポケモン
German Neuschnee-Pokémon
French Pokémon Poudreuse
Italian Pokémon Nevefresca
Spanish Pokémon Nieve Fresca
Korean 신설포켓몬
Chinese (Simplified) 新雪宝可梦
Chinese (Traditional) 新雪寶可夢

Name origin

glacier
large mass of ice
eon
long period of time (implying evolution)
